title: Travelers Backpacks X Colourful Containers Dark
description: adds compatibility for the Backpacks mod and Colourful Containers Dark resource pack
body: Makes the Backpack inventory from [Travelers Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) the same dark hue from the [Colourful Containers Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-dark-mode-gui) Resource Pack do add parity between the two.
